items.title_en: The Iran war is compounding California's energy crunch
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧了加州的能源危机
items.desc_en: While the United States leans into its domestic crude oil production, one state is being left out to dry, California.
items.desc_zh: 虽然美国倾向于国内原油生产，但有一个州却被排除在外，那就是加利福尼亚州。

items.title_en: Investor Joe Terranova says one public stock is a back door way to play the booming fortunes of private Anthropic
items.title_zh: 投资者乔·泰拉诺瓦 (Joe Terranova) 表示，一只公开股票是利用私人 Anthropic 蓬勃发展的财富的后门方式
items.desc_en: Zoom, which has a stake in Anthropic, is a good way to play the red-hot private AI firm, according to Virtus Investment Partners' Joe Terranova.
items.desc_zh: Virtus Investment Partners 的 Joe Terranova 表示，持有 Anthropic 股份的 Zoom 是与这家炙手可热的私人人工智能公司竞争的好方法。

items.title_en: Israelis war-weary but most oppose Iran ceasefire, poll suggests
items.title_zh: 民意调查显示，以色列人厌倦了战争，但大多数人反对伊朗停火
items.desc_en: The vast majority did not believe Hezbollah or Iran had been severely weakened by weeks of Israeli and US attacks, according to the poll.
items.desc_zh: 民意调查显示，绝大多数人不相信真主党或伊朗因以色列和美国数周的袭击而受到严重削弱。

items.title_zh: 总统炮轰教皇后，教皇利奥表示“我不害怕特朗普政府”

items.desc_zh: 教皇利奥谴责美国和以色列对伊朗发动的战争，引起了唐纳德·特朗普总统的愤怒。

items.title_zh: 贝莱德提高对美国股市的看法，认为战争已经结束，利润上升
items.desc_en: The firm, which manages $14 trillion for clients, said in its weekly market note that it raised the rating a notch to overweight from neutral.
items.desc_zh: 该公司为客户管理着 14 万亿美元的资产，该公司在每周市场报告中表示，其评级从“中性”上调至“增持”。

items.title_en: Trump deletes Truth Social image depicting him as Jesus: 'I thought it was me as a doctor'
items.title_zh: 特朗普删除了将他描绘成耶稣的真相社会形象：“我以为那是我作为一名医生”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump in May 2025 posted an apparent AI image depicting himself as a Catholic pope after the death of Pope Francis.
items.desc_zh: 2025 年 5 月，唐纳德·特朗普总统在弗朗西斯教皇去世后发布了一张明显的人工智能图像，将自己描绘成天主教教皇。

items.title_en: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed?
items.title_zh: 华尔街仍然热爱流媒体，但它的喜爱程度是否合理？

items.desc_zh: 虽然流媒体继续推动媒体股，特别是在季度收益方面，但目前尚不清楚它何时会开始为小型企业带来利润。

items.title_en: U.S. blockade of Strait of Hormuz set to begin
items.title_zh: 美国将开始封锁霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: The U.S. blockade, set to begin at 10 a.m. ET, will apply to "any and all Ships trying to enter, or leave, the Strait of Hormuz," President Donald Trump said.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统特朗普表示，美国的封锁将于东部时间上午 10 点开始，适用于“任何试图进入或离开霍尔木兹海峡的船只”。

items.title_en: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
items.title_zh: 秘鲁选举在选票交付惨败后陷入第二天
items.desc_en: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 技术和后勤问题意味着秘鲁人选择新总统和国会议员周一将继续投票。

items.title_en: Iran carried out highest number of executions in decades
items.title_zh: 伊朗处决人数为数十年来最高
items.desc_en: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 许多组织警告称，今年早些时候席卷伊朗的反政府抗议活动之后，可能会有更多人被处决。

items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.desc_en: Revolution Medicines' drug for pancreatic cancer succeeded in a highly anticipated Phase 3 trial.
items.desc_zh: Revolution Medicines 治疗胰腺癌的药物在备受期待的 3 期试验中取得了成功。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_en: Ghanaian footballer killed after armed attackers open fire at team bus
items.title_zh: 加纳足球运动员在武装袭击者向球队巴士开火后丧生
items.desc_en: The team was returning from a fixture when they were attacked by "masked men wielding guns and assault rifles", officials say.
items.desc_zh: 官员们表示，球队在结束一场比赛返回时遭到“持枪和突击步枪的蒙面男子”的袭击。

items.title_zh: 特朗普因批评伊朗战争而攻击教皇
items.desc_en: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统指责利奥“在犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策方面糟糕”。

items.title_zh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯酒后驾车被捕后进入康复中心
items.desc_en: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.desc_zh: 在出庭日期前三周，这位歌手自愿住进治疗机构。

items.desc_zh: 周一的补选可能会巩固加拿大总理的权力，但他的“大帐篷”政党会太大吗？

items.title_zh: 人群聚集在印度标志性歌手的葬礼前
items.desc_en: The singer, who died at the age of 92, will be cremated with full state honours on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 这位享年 92 岁的歌手将于周一以国家荣誉火葬。

items.title_en: Eight to be awarded for bravery in Bondi Junction stabbing
items.title_zh: 八人因在邦迪交界处刺伤事件中表现英勇而获奖
items.desc_en: Six people were killed and ten injured after a man went on a stabbing rampage in an Australian mall.
items.desc_zh: 一名男子在澳大利亚一家购物中心持刀行凶，造成六人死亡、十人受伤。

items.title_en: Congressman Eric Swalwell quits California governor race amid sexual misconduct claims
items.title_zh: 众议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔因性行为不当指控退出加州州长竞选
items.desc_en: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.
items.desc_zh: 民主党的高级盟友加大了对他的压力，要求他退出州长竞选。

items.title_en: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.title_zh: 欧尔班时代被彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）在匈牙利选举中的压倒性胜利所取代
items.desc_en: Viktor Orbán's 16 years in power is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
items.desc_zh: 欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的执政生涯结束了，他被一位 45 岁的前党内人士击败，并说服大多数匈牙利人将他赶下台。

items.desc_zh: 莫尔代克已被指定拆除，为一座大型变电站让路。

items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits

items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。
